title: Sokoura Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sokoura, with a Z-Score of +4.57. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Sokoura has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0 out of 10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 41% and the wind speed is 19.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
